entries.round: task:Execute Phase 1 of tasks.md: 1. Scaffold a Next.js 15 App Router project in the root directory using 'run_bash' (npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias '@/*'). 2. Set up Sanity.io configuration and basic schemas (Article, Category, Author) inside a 'sanity/' folder or integrated studio. 3. Update 'src/app/layout.tsx' with next/font (Inter, vietnamese subset) and correct <html lang='vi'>. Use <write_file> to create or modify necessary files. Update tasks.md checkboxes for completed items.
